atten4.ptxt: When installing the name plate, heat the vehicle body and name plate using a heat light.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body and name plate excessively.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR NAME PLATE

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body surface.
Remove the double-sided tape from the vehicle body.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.

s2.ptxt: Clean the name plate. (If reusing the name plate)

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the name plate.
Remove the double-sided tape from the name plate.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.
Apply new double-sided tape to the name plate.
Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body and name plate.
Remove the release paper from the name plate.

atten4.ptxt: After removing the release paper, keep the exposed adhesive free from foreign matter.

s3.ptxt: Install the name plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 3 LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR NAME PLATE

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body surface.
Remove the double-sided tape from the vehicle body.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.

s2.ptxt: Clean the name plate. (If reusing the name plate)

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the name plate.
Remove the double-sided tape from the name plate.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.
Apply new double-sided tape to the name plate.
Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body and name plate.
Remove the release paper from the name plate.

atten4.ptxt: After removing the release paper, keep the exposed adhesive free from foreign matter.

s3.ptxt: Install the name plate.
For name plate LE:
For name plate XLE:
For name plate SE:
